MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk: K. Liu ; Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances:
Plaintiff Hayman Brothers, Inc., A California Corp. is present. Represented by Sylla Abdoulaya .
Attorney Michael Rossoff appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Otgon Bayanmunkh is present.
Attorney Amber Lu representing the defendant through limited scope.

Judge Ronald E. Quidachay , litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 501, for settlement discussions. This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed.
The trial date of May-7-2012 is vacated. (501/REQ)
